title: AgentGuard /v1/check wire protocol
description: Schema for the request and response bodies of POST /v1/check, plus shared enums. Frozen at v0.5; new optional fields may be added under v1, but no field is ever removed and no field's name or type ever changes. Breaking changes ship as a separate v2 schema.

schemaVersion.description: Wire-protocol version. Always 'v1' for this schema. Servers reject any other value with HTTP 400.

scope.description: Policy rule scope. Built-in scopes: filesystem, shell, network, browser, cost, data. Custom scopes may be defined in policy.

action.description: Action verb for action-style scopes (e.g. read, write, delete on filesystem).

command.description: Shell command string for the shell scope.

path.description: Filesystem path for the filesystem scope. The server URL-decodes %HH once, then rejects any '..' segment after filepath.Clean.

url.description: Full URL for the network scope.

agent_id.description: Stable agent identifier. Used as a per-agent override key and as a rate-limit key.

session_id.description: Session identifier; required to use cost.max_per_session accumulation.

est_cost.description: Estimated cost of this action in USD. Required for the cost scope.

meta.description: Free-form string-keyed metadata. Forwarded to notifiers and the audit log.

matched_rule.description: Identifier of the rule that produced the decision (e.g. 'allow:shell:ls', 'deny:filesystem:path_traversal').

approval_id.description: Set only when decision is REQUIRE_APPROVAL. Format: 'ap_' followed by 32 hex chars.

approval_url.description: Set only when decision is REQUIRE_APPROVAL. Absolute URL clients can hit to approve.
